title: Closing the last tab in a panel does not close the panel
author: C4rb0n
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
When the last tab in a panel is closed, the panel should also close, as was behavior prior to published nightly v1.77.2-nb.

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->
When the last tab in a panel is closed, the panel should also close, as was behavior prior to published nightly v1.77.2-nb.

## Curre...

iterations.description: Empty panel close after last tab

comments.author: simonai1254
comments.snippet: I can support this, the only reason I can see to retain an empty connection panel is if you open not stored connections again...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Likely addressed by panel-close behavior fixes already packaged upstream: PR #3106 and follow-up panel empty-state fix on fork release branch. 
 
Please retest on latest RC candidate build; if resolved, recommend close as duplicate/resolved.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
Packaged fix is now available in PR #3126: PR #3126 on `mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG` This adds auto-close for empty panels after last-tab close flow in ConnectionWindow and guards against shutdown/dispose race paths.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available in community release**

This fix is included in a community build from our fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). Available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and let us know if the issue is fully resolved.
